zh.lifeSummary: 當William Purefoy IV於1379年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓時，他的父親Sir William Purefoy24歲，母親Margaret Chetwynd7歲。他於大約1410年與Marion Ayot在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可可特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1466年3月29日享年87歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾分尼 德雷頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Purefoy IV于1379年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓时，他的父亲Sir William Purefoy24岁，母亲Margaret Chetwynd7岁。他于大约1410年与Marion Ayot在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可可特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1466年3月29日享年87岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾分尼 德雷頓。

nameMeanings.name: Purefoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French par fei ‘by (my) faith’, a nickname for someone who habitually used this expression. Compare Purifoy . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Purefoy IV was born in 1379, in Drayton, Leicestershire, England, his father, Sir William Purefoy, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Chetwynd, was 7. He married Marion Ayot about 1410, in Foxcote, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 March 1466, at the age of 87, and was buried in Fenny Drayton, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Purefoy IV est né en 1379, à Drayton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Purefoy, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Chetwynd, avait 7 ans. Il a épousé Marion Ayot environ 1410, à Foxcote, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 mars 1466, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Fenny Drayton, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Purefoy IV 1379 in Drayton, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Purefoy 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Chetwynd 7. Er hat um 1410 in Foxcote, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Marion Ayot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. März 1466 im Alter von 87 Jahren und wurde in Fenny Drayton, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Purefoy IV è nato il nel 1379 nel Drayton, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Purefoy, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Chetwynd, aveva 7 anni. Lui sposato Marion Ayot circa 1410, nel Foxcote, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 marzo 1466, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Fenny Drayton, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Purefoy IVが1379年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアドレイトンで生まれた時，父Sir William Purefoyは24歳，母Margaret Chetwyndは7歳であった。約1410年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフォクスコトでMarion Ayotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1466年3月29日に87歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアフエニー ドレイトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Purefoy IV(이)가 1379년 영국 레이스스터실르 드라이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Purefoy(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Chetwynd(은)는 7세였다. 그는 대략 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 폭스컷에서 Marion Ayot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1466년 3월 29일 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 펜이 드라이턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Purefoy IV nasceu em 1379, em Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Purefoy, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Chetwynd, tinha 7 anos. Ele casou-se com Marion Ayot aproximadamente 1410, em Foxcote, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de março de 1466, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Fenny Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Purefoy IV родился в 1379 г. в местности дреитон, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Purefoy было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Chetwynd, 7. Он женился на женщине по имени Marion Ayot около 1410 г. в местности фокскот, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 марта 1466 г. в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности фенни дреитон, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Purefoy IV nació en 1379, en Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Purefoy, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Chetwynd, tenía 7 años. Se casó con Marion Ayot aproximadamente 1410, en Foxcote, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1466, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Fenny Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
